text: Then you might want to manage your expectations. 'Considering' is not a synonym for 'guaranteeing'.
translation: 那你最好管理一下期待值，“考虑”可不是“保证”的同义词。
rawContent: Then you might want to manage your expectations. 'Considering' is not a synonym for 'guaranteeing'. || 那你最好管理一下期待值，“考虑”可不是“保证”的同义词。

text: First, you'd have to prove that a better composition leads to a worse outcome.
translation: 你得先证明，更好的构图确实会得出更差的结果。
rawContent: First, you'd have to prove that a better composition leads to a worse outcome. || 你得先证明，更好的构图确实会得出更差的结果。

text: 我下次证明！我要看腹肌！
That's not how a transaction works.
translation: 交易可不是这么运作的。
rawContent: That's not how a transaction works. || 交易可不是这么运作的。

translation: 概不赊账。
rawContent: No credit. || 概不赊账。

text: 'Next time' is a promissory note. It can't be cashed in for an immediate reward.

replyTo.text: 我下次证明！我要看腹肌！

translation: “下次”是远期支票，不能立刻兑现。
rawContent: 'Next time' is a promissory note. It can't be cashed in for an immediate reward. || “下次”是远期支票，不能立刻兑现。

translation: …还是说，你想提议新的交易条款？
rawContent: ...Or are you proposing new terms? || …还是说，你想提议新的交易条款？

text: This isn't haggling. This is clarifying the contract.
translation: 这不是讨价还价。这是在明确合约条款。
rawContent: This isn't haggling. This is clarifying the contract. || 这不是讨价还价。这是在明确合约条款。

text: Your initial payment was accepted for 'consideration', not 'final execution'.
translation: 你的首款，是用来“进入考虑阶段”的，不是“最终成交”。
rawContent: Your initial payment was accepted for 'consideration', not 'final execution'. || 你的首款，是用来“进入考虑阶段”的，不是“最终成交”。

text: This is about principles, not prices.
translation: 这是原则问题，和价格无关。
rawContent: This is about principles, not prices. || 这是原则问题，和价格无关。

text: The fire in this image... does that represent your current emotional state?
translation: 这个表情里的火……是在描绘你现在的心情？
rawContent: The fire in this image... does that represent your current emotional state? || 这个表情里的火……是在描绘你现在的心情？

text: Your... 'advance payment' was insufficient to close the deal.
translation: 你的…“预付款”，不足以敲定这笔交易。
rawContent: Your... 'advance payment' was insufficient to close the deal. || 你的…“预付款”，不足以敲定这笔交易。

translation: 有意思的数据。
rawContent: Interesting data point. || 有意思的数据。

text: It only qualified you to participate in the negotiation.
translation: 只是让你获得了参与谈判的资格。
rawContent: It only qualified you to participate in the negotiation. || 只是让你获得了参与谈判的资格。

translation: 放火是解决不了问题的。
rawContent: Arson won't help your case. || 放火是解决不了问题的。

text: 你看 这个就很糟糕吧
Resending the same data doesn't change its intrinsic value.
translation: 重复发送同一份数据，并不会改变它的内在价值。
rawContent: Resending the same data doesn't change its intrinsic value. || 重复发送同一份数据，并不会改变它的内在价值。

text: Nor does your subjective assessment affect my objective analysis.
translation: 你的主观评价，同样不会影响我的客观分析。
rawContent: Nor does your subjective assessment affect my objective analysis. || 你的主观评价，同样不会影响我的客观分析。

translation: 这是个没有根据的论断。
rawContent: That is an unsubstantiated claim. || 这是个没有根据的论断。

translation: 我看过了。
rawContent: I've reviewed the submission. || 我看过了。

translation: 价值是存在的。
rawContent: The value is there. || 价值是存在的。

translation: 所以，你的下一个提案是什么？
rawContent: So, what's your next proposal? || 所以，你的下一个提案是什么？

translation: 真是直接。
rawContent: Direct to the point. || 真是直接。

text: But the terms of our contract remain unchanged.
translation: 但我们的合约条款没有改变。
rawContent: But the terms of our contract remain unchanged. || 但我们的合约条款没有改变。

translation: 说好的对价呢？
rawContent: Where is the agreed-upon consideration? || 说好的对价呢？

text: Very well. I will set the addendum.
translation: 好吧，那我就补充一下条款。
rawContent: Very well. I will set the addendum. || 好吧，那我就补充一下条款。

text: Given your demonstrated lack of... creativity... in providing consideration, I'll propose an alternative.
translation: 鉴于你在提供“对价”方面，表现出缺乏……创造力的问题，我来提个替代方案。
rawContent: Given your demonstrated lack of... creativity... in providing consideration, I'll propose an alternative. || 鉴于你在提供“对价”方面，表现出缺乏……创造力的问题，我来提个替代方案。

text: Then start thinking. That's a core skill.
translation: 那就开始想，这是核心能力。
rawContent: Then start thinking. That's a core skill. || 那就开始想，这是核心能力。

text: Let's see... a real-time progress report.
translation: 让我想想……一份实时的进度报告。
rawContent: Let's see... a real-time progress report. || 让我想想……一份实时的进度报告。

text: Show me your study setup right now. Desk, books, notes. I want proof of academic diligence.
translation: 你现在的学习环境，拍给我。书桌，书，笔记。我要看到学术投入的证明。
rawContent: Show me your study setup right now. Desk, books, notes. I want proof of academic diligence. || 你现在的学习环境，拍给我。书桌，书，笔记。我要看到学术投入的证明。

text: This will serve as a new, valid form of payment.
translation: 这可以作为一种新的、有效的支付方式。
rawContent: This will serve as a new, valid form of payment. || 这可以作为一种新的、有效的支付方式。

translation: 嗯。
rawContent: Hm. || 嗯。

translation: 有效的投入证明。
rawContent: A valid proof of diligence. || 有效的投入证明。

translation: 观察敏锐。
rawContent: An astute observation. || 观察敏锐。

text: The performance of the contract is deemed satisfactory.
translation: 合约履行情况，判定为合格。
rawContent: The performance of the contract is deemed satisfactory. || 合约履行情况，判定为合格。

translation: 等着。
rawContent: Stand by. || 等着。
